name: ParaSurf
description: Predict paratope residues using geometric and non-geometric factors. Accurately predicts antibody binding sites across the Fab region, achieving state-of-the-art results.
capabilities: Predict paratope residues using geometric and non-geometric factors
Accurately predicts antibody binding sites across the Fab region, achieving state-of-the-art results

antibody_structure.description: Antibody Fab structure file in PDB format

heavy_chain_id.description: Chain ID of the heavy chain in the PDB file

light_chain_id.description: Chain ID of the light chain in the PDB file
